creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #1)
As Mark Felder stated in the comments of PR 237372 he doesn't use Elastic + Kibana anymore and cannot maintain it. It would be glad if somebody (you) can take these ports.

see: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=237372
